name: tsvikas
description: Personal Claude Code skills by Tsvika Shapira.

plugins.name: prune-comments
plugins.description: Documentation-only pass that fights comment-slop: drops, trims, moves, and de-duplicates comments and docstrings, leaving only the ones that earn their place. Never changes code.

plugins.name: mattpocock-skills
plugins.description: Matt Pocock's everyday engineering and productivity skills (tdd, code-review, triage, research, and more). Vendored via his upstream plugin repo, which ships no marketplace of its own.
